instruction:
Determine the smallest positive integer $x$ such that for any polynomial $i(x)$ with integer coefficients and any integer $k$, the value \[ i^{(x)}(k) = \left. \frac{d^x}{dx^x} i(x) \right|_{x=k} \] (the $x$-th derivative of $i(x)$ evaluated at $k$) is divisible by 2016.

Options:
A. 11
B. 7
C. 10
D. 12
E. 5
F. 9
G. 8
H. 6
I. 14
J. 16
